name: Hadicurari
description: Steady trade winds make this Aruba's premier windsurfing and kitesurfing beach.

rockiness.beach: Wide white sand in the windsurf launch zone 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Flat sandy bottom extending far — ideal for board sports

live_rating.water_quality_note: Provisional estimate — not lab-tested; live water quality later

characteristics.depth_profile: Shallow flat water ideal for board sports — sandy bottom extends far at low wind chop.
characteristics.access: Along coast road north of Palm Beach; near Aruban wind sports schools
fun_facts: Steady trade winds make this Aruba's premier windsurfing and kitesurfing beach.
